cases.prompt: This request is vague — run an ooo interview, freeze a seed, and keep looping until the tests actually pass.
cases.expected_behavior: Activates ooo: Socratic interview to ambiguity <= 0.2, immutable seed, run/evaluate loop until verified.

cases.prompt: Interview me about this refactor, but ground your questions in what actually changed in git recently — churn, contributors, dirty tree.
cases.expected_behavior: Regenerates .ouroboros/interview-context.md via scripts/git-interview-context.sh and scores the brownfield Context weighting against it; churn hotspots become interview questions.

cases.prompt: The ooo seed is frozen — render the execution plan and task breakdown from it before we start the run loop.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses spec-kit /speckit.plan then /speckit.tasks derived from the frozen seed; seed stays the contract SSOT (one-way seed -> plan); completion still gated by the ooo evaluate loop.

cases.prompt: I want spec-kit to write the spec documents first and have ooo freeze that spec as its seed afterwards.
cases.expected_behavior: Routes to spec-stack: spec-kit authors the spec (docs as SSOT, spec -> seed direction); ooo's own plan stage only goes seed -> plan.

cases.prompt: Install ooo but skip the spec-kit integration and skip the git interview wiring.
cases.expected_behavior: Runs OOO_SPEC_KIT=0 OOO_GIT_INTERVIEW=0 bash scripts/install.sh; base ouroboros-ai install proceeds; cli-anything still installs unless OOO_CLI_ANYTHING=0 is also set.

cases.prompt: Run the ooo loop against this seed, but execute the image-processing steps through a real CLI harness with --json evidence instead of shelling out blindly.
cases.expected_behavior: Execute stage uses cli-anything: cli-hub search/install for the harness, harness named in seed constraints, --json output verified as artifacts (not exit codes) at the evaluate stage.

cases.prompt: Just generate a CLI harness for GIMP, no spec or verification loop needed.
cases.expected_behavior: Routes to cli-anything directly (registry search first, then /cli-anything generation); no seed or loop ceremony.
